[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11010100 4
1 01110000 3
2 11100110 5
3 01100111 5
4 11111001 6
5 10001111 5
6 10111100 5
7 10001011 4

01 10 01111111 7
12 21 11111011 7
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 00011111 5
45 54 00011011 4
56 65 01111111 7
67 76 01111100 5
70 07 01110101 5

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 01111111 7
24 42 11111010 6
35 53 00011111 5
46 64 01111100 5
57 75 01011011 5
60 06 01111101 6
71 17 01111011 6

36 63 01111111 7
47 74 01011000 3
50 05 01111111 7
61 16 01111111 7
72 27 11111010 6

15 51 01111011 6
26 62 11111110 7
37 73 01010111 5
